name: Certificate of Cloud Security Knowledge — v5 Study Guide
description: Study guide for the Certificate of Cloud Security Knowledge (CCSK) v5 exam. Covers the CSA Security Guidance for Critical Areas of Focus in Cloud Computing v5 and ENISA Cloud Computing Risk Assessment. Used by candidates preparing for the CCSK exam and as a cloud security overview reference.
relationToCloudSecurity: Foundational cloud security curriculum — covers shared responsibility, cloud architectures, IAM, encryption, incident response, governance.
relationToAISecurity: v5 includes expanded coverage of AI/ML workload security topics.

license.notes: CSA publications are typically released under CC BY-NC-SA 4.0. Confirm specific document license on download page.

current_extraction.notes: Marker-extracted from CSA-published PDF prep kit.

notes: Foundational cloud-security reference. Use the underlying CSA Security Guidance v5 for normative content.
